title: Product Merge — Client × Product Coverage
grain: one row per client-product pairing (a product a client offers, tagged by L&A Type)
summary: Long-format mapping of which insurance products each L&A client offers, tagged by L&A Type (Individual Life, Annuities, Group, Retirement). Each row is one client-product pair. Lets you see a client's product mix or find all clients offering a given product.
use_cases: Which products does a given L&A client offer?
Which clients offer a specific product (e.g. Universal Life)?
What products fall under a given L&A Type?

columns.name: Product
columns.note: specific insurance product (e.g. Term Life, Whole Life, 401k); ~41 distinct values

not_answerable.q: Volumes, revenue or headcount by product
not_answerable.reason: this table records only the client-product mapping, no measures
process detail lives in the process sheets, not here
